text:
average beneficiary CMS-HCC risk score 1327 Num 8 
AVG_RISK_SCORE_75_PCTL CMS-HCC risk score is at or above the national 75th percentile Indicator for whether practice's average beneficiary CMS-HCC risk score is at or above the 75th percentile of beneficiaries nationwide. Used as part of criteria for determining practice’s eligibility for the high-risk bonus adjustment. 1328 Num 8 Equals 1 if a practice's average beneficiary’s risk is at or above the 75th percentile of beneficiaries
